steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Scaffolded Vite + React + TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS; build passes, types defined, stub App renders on dark background.

steps.name: youtube-client
steps.summary: Created src/services/youtube.ts with parseVideoId (handles watch/youtu.be/shorts URLs) and fetchComments (YouTube Data API v3, maps to Comment[]); build passes with no TypeScript errors.

steps.name: analysis-client
steps.summary: Created src/services/analysis.ts with analyzeComments that calls Anthropic Messages API via fetch, builds the prompt from Comment[], parses the JSON response into AnalysisReport, and throws on missing API key or non-2xx response.

steps.name: report-ui
steps.summary: Built App.tsx with full state orchestration, URLInput component with status-aware button labels, and ReportDisplay component with sentiment pill, breakdown bars, strengths/improvements cards; fade-in CSS added; build passes.
